summary: Phase 1 frontend testing complete. All navbar features working correctly on both desktop and mobile views.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 complete. Navbar fully functional. CSS variables, utility classes (.glass-card, .btn-glass, .btn-primary), Google Fonts (Instrument Serif + Inter), all data-testid attributes all verified. Mobile hamburger opens dropdown with all 4 nav links + CTA. Desktop shows links + CTA, hides hamburger. Responsive breakpoint at 767px works correctly.
